'''Grania''' was a [[Singing Mountain Clan]] sister from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] and friend of [[Teneniel Djo]] who turned to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] and joined the [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsisters]].
